title: CampRecord (compact, app-facing runtime shape)
description: The short-key record shape shipped to the browser and consumed by packages/route-components/src/lib/campgroundShared.ts in gpx-route-planner. This is the OUTPUT of the 'compact' pipeline stage — do not change key names without updating that package and its consumers (federalCampgrounds.ts, RouteMapView).

i.description: Stable id, unique within an agency file (site_id / object_id / osm-<type>-<id>).

n.description: Display name, title-cased if source was all-caps.

t.description: FacilityType — drives glyph + default layer grouping.

r.description: Collapsed reservation status — drives marker tier via tierFor().

rc.description: Confidence qualifier for r; omitted for reservable/mixed.

f.description: Fee charged: 1 yes, 0 no, null unknown.

w.description: Presence flag: drinking water available. Field omitted (not false) when not available.

rt.description: Presence flag: restroom available. Field omitted when not available.

tn.description: Closest town(s) or BLM unit name.

sub.description: Raw subtype string for drawer display (BLM feature_subtype).

fee_d.description: Multi-line fee schedule, whitespace-normalized but newlines preserved.

ph.description: Phone number (reserved for future OSM/other sources).

em.description: Email address (reserved for future OSM/other sources).
